register.title: Open your account
register.subtitle: Join free and start to learn the way your brain dey really work.
register.terms: When you open account, you don gree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in make your streak no break.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We send 6-digit code and one magic link go {{email}}. Enter the code or click the link — whichever fast pass.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we go send you reset link.
forgot.sent_body: If account dey for {{email}}, reset link dey come.

password_rules: At least 8 characters, with 1 capital letter and 1 number.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.password_uppercase: Add at least one capital letter

toasts.registered: Account don create — check your email make you verify.
